Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
394 
SRVC_LOC_NPI_NUM 
LABEL: 
Claim Service Location NPI Number 
DESCRIPTION: The National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the location where the services were provided. 
SHORT NAME: SRVC_LOC_NPI_NUM 
LONG NAME: SRVC_LOC_NPI_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
22 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field was new in January 2014. It is null/missing for all years prior.
